title: Lifted: Experiencing The Resurrection Life
author: Sam Allberry
targetAudience: Individuals seeking to deepen their understanding of Christian faith and the concept of resurrection
relatedBooks: The Resurrection of the Son of God by N.T. Wright
The Case for Christ by Lee Strobel
keyInsights: Understanding the implications of resurrection in daily life
Embracing a renewed identity in Christ
Living out faith in practical ways
